title: Content Provenance Attestation (CPA)
description: Signed record binding specific content to the producing agent, the delegation credential, the reviewer, and an approval timestamp. See SPEC.md §4.6.

content_id.description: Stable reference to the content (URL, URN, or content hash).

produced_by.description: AXIS ID of the agent that produced the content.

produced_under_credential.description: ID of the Delegation Credential authorizing the production agent to produce this kind of content.

reviewed_by.description: AXIS ID of the reviewing agent or operator.

root_operator.description: Root operator at the top of the delegation chain used to produce this content.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature by the reviewer, base64url-encoded (no padding).
